---
title: "Describing Networks"
format: html
previous:
  href: "../index.qmd"
  text: "Home"
next:
  href: "theory-structure.qmd"
  text: "Network Structure"
---

## Learning outcomes

By the end of this unit, learners will be able to:

-   describe key structural features of networks\
-   explain how nodes differ in terms of connectivity and role\
-   distinguish between different types of relationships (e.g. reciprocal, transitive)\
-   interpret network structures using core concepts from network analysis

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
